content.problemStatement:
Given a list of integers, find the first element that appears exactly once in the list.


Input Format

First line contains TTT - the number of test cases
For each test case:

First line contains NNN - size of array
Second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,...,ANA_1, A_2, ..., A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,...,AN‚Äč




Output Format

For each test case print the first element that appears exactly once in the list
If no such element exists, print -1
